text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know, to make it as an Umadol, it's extra
important to keep up with the latest trends!♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know much about Umadols,
but I think that's a great point!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Then first things first — folding fans!
The flashier and fluffier they are, the more
attention you'll grab♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Fluffy folding fans? I don't think
I've ever seen those…

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Flashy and super fluffy? Oooh! Sounds
great — perfect for an Umadol!☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Pair that with a glittering bodycon dress
and you'll be super fly!♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Bodycon? I've never heard that either…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
With that settled, let's go get changed!
We've got to jet while the iron's hot!♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's do iiit!☆ Woo! Umadols, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a minute! I'm pretty sure none of those are the latest trends!
